# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Adjusted the bead project prompt renderer and br dependency-tree model to match the live flat `br dep tree <id> --json` shape. `BeadPromptBrPort::bead_dep_tree` and the real `BrAdapter` implementation now deserialize a `Vec<DepTreeNode>`, `DepTreeNode` carries `depth` and `parent_id` metadata, and the renderer derives direct blocker context from nodes where `depth == 1` and `parent_id` matches the requested bead. Updated renderer mocks and added/updated flat-shape coverage in both the prompt tests and adapter tests so the real adapter path no longer relies on the old nested `children` shape.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree contains live orchestration state changes under `.ralph-burning/projects/4wdb-1/` that I did not treat as source review scope.","`cargo test` passed but emitted existing unused-code/import warnings in test builds; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed cleanly."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the existing renderer, `DepTreeNode` model, p
